prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is E-602 Equipment bonding within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.6 Grounding & Bonding. The observed field condition is: missing bonding jumper around water meter. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 250.104, 250.30.
title: T4 E-602 Code/spec compliance
